name: vscode-graph-agent
description: A minimal workspace-aware VS Code chat participant with a FastAPI backend.

chatParticipants.name: workspace
chatParticipants.description: Basic chat for the current workspace with progress updates.

vscodeGraphAgent.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to start the FastAPI backend.

vscodeGraphAgent.port.description: Local port for the backend service.

vscodeGraphAgent.model.description: Model name used by the backend agent.

vscodeGraphAgent.baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for the backend model.

vscodeGraphAgent.apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name that stores the model API key.
